ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Demographic factor (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "dep06" INTEGER /* Region (e.g., Dep06) */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of records in the dataset */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_ranges" (
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age range */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the age range belongs to */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 0.4, 5.9, 10.14) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of records in the age range */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age range */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age range */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Category of the age range (e.g., infant, child, adult) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_ranges_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the region belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., Dep06) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of records in the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the year belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of data coverage for the year */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the factor belongs to */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Demographic factor (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of demographic factor (e.g., gender, ethnicity) */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factors_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "data_source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_source_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used to access the dataset */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the dashboard */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the data visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the data visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the visualization was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the visualization */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
